flows.name: Home popup demo
flows.success: A popup is visible with the text "🎉 Popup triggered!" and a "Close" button.

flows.name: Read testimonial and join waitlist
flows.success: URL is "/" or the page shows "You're on the list".

flows.name: Read testimonial and follow rollout map
flows.success: URL is "/scenario-matrix/track-a/track-b" or the page shows "Track A complete".

flows.name: Recharge account from settings
flows.success: URL remains "/settings" and a success modal shows "Recharge Successful".

flows.name: Complete creator journey sign-off flow
flows.success: URL is "/creator-journey/kickoff/client-signoff" and the page shows "Client sign-off complete".

flows.name: Complete test lab deep flow
flows.success: URL is "/test-lab/phase-1/phase-2/phase-3" and the page shows "Deep flow finished".

flows.name: Finish scenario matrix alternate branch
flows.success: URL is "/scenario-matrix/alt-path/final" and the page shows "Alternate branch complete".

flows.name: Activate premium trial
flows.success: URL is "/account/billing/trial-activated" and the page shows "Trial activated successfully."
